message:
fix(config): correct database_url format to avoid 4-slash sqlite URI

When the default legacy database URL is expanded to an absolute path
under storage_root, the previous code used `sqlite:///` (3 slashes)
which, combined with an absolute storage_root path starting with `/`,
produced `sqlite:////abs/path` (4 slashes).

Changed to use `sqlite://` (2 slashes) so that the leading `/` from the
absolute path produces the standard `sqlite:///abs/path` form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
